# ClearCo

ClearCo (formerly ClearCompany) is shipping a full agentic suite for the talent lifecycle. The Talent Agents platform (general availability as of 16 July 2026) bundles Req, Sourcing, Interview, Performance Admin, and Review agents plus an "Agent Studio" control panel that lets HR configure and govern agent behavior without engineering. ClearCo's bet is that mid-market customers want multi-agent orchestration for every hiring and talent workflow but need low-code governance to stay compliant and avoid lock-in. The risk: agent orchestration across evaluation, performance, and review raises stakes for bias testing and auditability.

## Timeline

- **16 Jul 2026** — ClearCo (formerly ClearCompany) puts its Talent Agents into general availability, shipping a launch portfolio — Req, Sourcing, Interview, Performance Admin, and Review agents — plus an "Agent Studio" control panel that lets HR configure and govern agent behavior without engineering. It's another full agentic suite going live in a mainstream talent platform; before letting the Interview or Sourcing agents touch candidates, pressure-test them for auditability and adverse-impact monitoring. — [ClearCo](https://www.prweb.com/releases/clearco-unveils-agent-platform-for-the-talent-lifecycle-302802101.html)

## Open questions

- How does Agent Studio surface or constrain agent behavior without requiring engineering?
- Can a mid-market customer actually govern five agents independently, or does orchestration create hidden coupling?
